item.name: Garlond GL-IS Ignition Key
item.description: A thin key that ignites your Garlond GL-IS's ceruleum engine, bringing the sidecar-equipped vehicle rumbling to life.

mount.name: Garlond GL-IS
mount.action: Summon forth your Garlond GL-IS. Fitted with a sidecar to carry a trusty sidekick.
mount.description: A variant of the Garlond GL-I, this magitek vehicle is fitted with a sidecar to allow for two riders, with engine displacement increased to handle the additional weight. Comes with a life-size mascot lovingly crafted by Wedge─but strictly for a limited time only, and while stocks last!
mount.tooltip:
It's a Garlond through and through.
- Cid
